summary: Mid-level ops manager at a 200-person HR tech company. Process-obsessed, budget-conscious, evaluates tools by time-to-value. Speaks in metrics and ROI.
pains: Juggling 5 disconnected tools for one workflow
Quarterly audits require manual data reconciliation
sample_quotes: If it's not in the dashboard, it didn't happen.
I need this to work on day one, not day thirty.
